description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test against multiple Python and ClickHouse versions on an ubuntu-20.04 environment. For each matrix combination, check out the code, set up Python, install test requirements, run flake8, set up the test environment, start a ClickHouse server container, run tests with coverage, and upload coverage to Coveralls. Additionally, run a separate job to indicate completion to Coveralls.io after all tests have finished.
